pi_items.source: Verified against LOGS_DIR and PROCESSED_FOLDER constants in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh
Verified against PROCESSED_FOLDER constant in export_result.sh and task descriptions
Verified against verifier.py logic where score depends on this target
Contradicted by export_result.sh which explicitly checks 'if len(search_text) < 15: return text_too_short'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating ~/Documents/ErrorLogs and the BlueMail Processed-Logs folder, then extracting email snippets into distinct files. The dataset used is the real SpamAssassin public email corpus. While the task instructs the agent to specifically extract 'technical error logs or stack traces', the verifier blindly passes any extracted text snippet that exists in the source emails, provided it is at least 15 characters long (contradicting the metadata claim of 20). The verifier also confirms the source emails were moved to Processed-Logs and that no loose files were left in the Documents root.
